items.title: Uncheck checklists in updates when item is duplicated
items.excerpt: We use the checklists in Updates to break out smaller parts of a task within an item. It would be great if we could duplicate the items for recurring tasks without having to go into each one and uncheck the checkboxes.

items.title: Ability for the "vote" column to accept multiple votes per team member
items.excerpt: It would be helpful if team members could upvote an item. Right now, you can only click vote one time on the “vote” column.

items.title: 'My Work' Keyboard Shortcut
items.excerpt:
It would be nice to have a keyboard shortcut to switch to the My Work view. 
Just like we have CTRL + B to pull up a board search. 
Maybe like CTRL + M to open up my work.
